[Tripod X Display with 24" x 60" Banner](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/tripod-x-display-24x60) 5. Tripod X Banner Stand with 24" x 60" Banner # Tripod X Display with 24" x 60" Banner The Tripod X Display has a professionally finished appearance and is easy to set up. The Tripod X Display makes a great addition to any trade show exhibit. It is made of lightweight fiberglass and plastic and is very portable. Includes a free carrying case. ![Tripod X with 60" x 24" Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2pcache/0f2dc39c-c182-4ebc-8c04-5622796decb3) Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for X Displays 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for X Displays Banner Soft Fabric for X Displays Product: with Tripod X Display 24x60 Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 60" x 24" 60" x 24" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Overview](#7863f338-e857-46c3-8ed2-5c65cf4e6dd1) ## Pick a Template All Templates Automotive Stands Boat Show Stands Bridal Expo Stands Business Stands Celebration Stands Church Stands Education Stands Fitness Stands Food and Beverage Stands Holiday Stands Home and Garden Stands Job Fair Stands Misc. Stands Music Stands Political Stands Real Estate Stands Restaurant Stands Sales Stands Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Trade Show Stands Wedding Stands Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ #### [Material](#materialCollapse) ### Tripod X Display with 24" x 60" Banner #### 13 oz Vinyl Our highest quality 13 oz vinyl banner material is the standard matieral used for banner stands. It's rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. #### Banner Soft Fabric Our banner soft fabric material offers a matte finish with vibrant colors. The edges of fabric will be cut with a hot knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor. We recommend being very careful while retracting the banner, as some fraying may still occur. [Click here to request a sample packet.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request "Sample Packets") #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based.eps files with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. #### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse) If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that.
